currentState.summary: R47 consensus fixes APPLIED. 11 findings fixed: C1 strip dispatch keys, C2 redis.asyncio, C3 CB bidirectional sync, C4 classifier degradation, C7 tombstone state, C10 deque pruning, C11 drain timeout, C14 Lua rate limit, C15 lock outside I/O, C5 auth tests, C6 property-based bypass tests. 2243 tests, 90.20% coverage.

Real casino data ingestion + demo preparation

realBugsFound: Redis package missing from lockfile — entire Redis integration dead code in prod (D6-C001)

Cosign binary downloaded without checksum — supply chain risk (D6-M001)
LLM_SEMAPHORE_TIMEOUT config dead — hardcoded at usage site (D8-M002)
